testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
15:58:19.188 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.smartcampus.backend.BackendApplicationTests]: BackendApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:58:19.416 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.smartcampus.backend.BackendApplication for test class com.smartcampus.backend.BackendApplicationTests
